subMenus.description: L'Abri has study centres around the world. Each location is a place of community, study, and hospitality. For general enquiries or to arrange a visit, please contact the centre nearest you.

albums.title: Men, Women, and the Bible
albums.description: For many today, the Bible's view of gender is a hot-button issue. Collected here are lectures on some of the most controversial passages on the genders as well as an overall framework for answering questions that often come up.

albums.description: What does it mean to be alone? To be with others? To be a friend? To be married? These lectures talk about the many questions that come up as we dance the steps of relationship.

albums.title: Literature and Poetry
albums.description: If Christ is Lord of all of life, the domain of the written word should be the concern of Christ's followers. Here is a collection of lectures on Flannery O'Connor, T. S. Eliot, Tolkien, Rowling, and more.
